reviews.review_title: Best only up vr game out there!
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun and I’m not the owner ( ps I am ) but you can climb you can talk to friends you can just chill and watch as everyone falls so that’s why it’s the best only up vr game with multiplayer  out there or at least the 2 lmao!
It’s gotta be one of the best only up games would recommend and you should add a computer to join private and public’s and cosmetics!!
